visual_description: In a room with green walls and wooden doors, three men and one woman are gathered around a gurney. A man in a white shirt and apron and a woman in a dark top are pushing the gurney, which holds a body covered in a light-colored, textured material. Two other men, one in a white shirt and tie and another in a dark suit, stand nearby observing the scene.
audio_description: A man speaks in a calm, inquisitive tone, followed by another man speaking in a calm, analytical tone. A third man speaks in a calm, directive tone. The audio is clear and intelligible.
